## Design Decisions

### Tone & Personality
[Chosen tone archetype + reasoning. E.g., "Premium Minimalist — the client operates in luxury healthcare, so we want restraint, whitespace, and quiet confidence. No playful elements. Every pixel earns its place."]

### Color System

**Primary Palette**:
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--color-bg-primary` | | Page background |
| `--color-bg-secondary` | | Card/section backgrounds |
| `--color-text-primary` | | Headings, key text |
| `--color-text-secondary` | | Body text |
| `--color-text-muted` | | Captions, metadata |
| `--color-accent` | | CTAs, links, highlights |
| `--color-accent-hover` | | Hover states |
| `--color-border` | | Borders, dividers |

### Hero Archetype
[Chosen hero layout + reasoning. E.g., "Split Hero — headline + CTA left, product screenshot right. Matches the SaaS convention the audience expects. Abstract art hero would confuse this audience."]

- **Level**: [Minimal / Moderate / Rich]

- **Scroll behavior**: [parallax, pin sections, reveal on scroll, etc.]

### Anti-Slop Guardrails
[Specific things to AVOID for this project. E.g.:]
- [ ] No Inter for display text
- [ ] No generic blue (#3B82F6) unless it's the brand color
- [ ] No "Powered by AI" badges
- [ ] No stock photo grids
- [ ] No centered-everything layouts

## Technical Notes

- **Breakpoints**: Mobile-first. Key breakpoints: `md` (768px), `lg` (1024px), `xl` (1280px)
- **Image format**: WebP with AVIF fallback. Max hero image 200KB.
- **Font loading**: `font-display: swap`, preload critical fonts in `<head>`
- **Performance budget**: LCP < 2.5s, CLS < 0.1, INP < 200ms
